service.title: Pick a service.
service.panelNote: Pick a service, then continue to the date screen.
service.loadingText: Fetching the catalog and booked-date data.
service.selectedServiceText: Continue to pick an available date.

date.title: Pick an available date.
date.panelNoteWithService: {{service}} service is ready. Choose any open day this month.
date.loadingText: Fetching booked dates for the chosen service.
date.calendarNote: Booked dates are blocked automatically and cannot be selected.
date.selectedDateText: Continue to enter the contact and address details.

contact.title: Enter contact details.
contact.panelNote: These details will be sent to the booking API when the request is submitted.
contact.loadingText: Loading booking state and catalog data.
contact.addressInvalid: Address must be at least 10 characters long.

flow.formIncomplete: Please fill in the contact number and address before submitting.
flow.bookingSubmitted: Booking request {{referenceId}} has been submitted for {{serviceName}}.
flow.bookingSubmitFailed: The booking request could not be submitted. Please try again.
flow.catalogLoadFailed: The booking catalog could not be loaded.
